questions.question_text: Answer the following questions. Write short note on: a What do you understand by EIA? 2.5 b What is Environmental Management? 2.5 c What is intermediate Value Theorem? 2.5 d What is connectedness in EIA? 2.5 e Why Public involvement in EIA important? 2.5 f What is Impact Management? 2.5 g Why Project Management is important? 2.5 h What do you mean by implementation and follow up in a project? 2.5
Describe the regulatory framework of Environmental management. 10
What is the difference between Methodologies and Methods? Explain. 10
Describe any one EIA tools and Technique. 10
Explain Mitigation and Preparation of Environmental Management Plan. 10
How can one review EIA Quality? 10
How do we kickstart a project imbibing sustainable development strategies? 10
How does Project management help in Decision Making and implementation of a project? 10
